Class Cookie

java.lang.Object
Main.Cookies.Cookie
Direct Known Subclasses:
BobaCookie, CrossiantCookie, SampleCookie, TomYumCookie
public abstract class Cookie extends Object
Abstract base class representing a playable cookie character. This class manages character properties such as health, score, animation control, movement mechanics, skill usage, and collision hitbox handling during gameplay.

  • Constructor Details

    • Cookie

      public Cookie(int id, String name, int hp, String description)
      Initializes a cookie with basic character information.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier of the cookie
      name - name of the cookie
      hp - maximum health points of the cookie
      description - description of the cookie character

  • Method Details

    • get_Id

      public int get_Id()
      Returns the cookie ID.
      Returns:
      cookie ID

    • get_Hp

      public int get_Hp()
      Returns the current health points of the cookie.
      Returns:
      current HP

    • get_Bid

      public String get_Bid()
      Returns the box image identifier.
      Returns:
      box image id

    • get_Sid

      public String get_Sid()
      Returns the skill image identifier.
      Returns:
      skill image id

    • get_Name

      public String get_Name()
      Returns the cookie name.
      Returns:
      cookie name

    • get_Desc

      public String get_Desc()
      Returns the cookie description.
      Returns:
      cookie description

    • get_Score

      public int get_Score()
      Returns the current score.
      Returns:
      current score

    • setScore

      public void setScore(int score)
      Sets the current score of the cookie.
      Parameters:
      score - new score value

    • useSkill

      public abstract void useSkill()
      Activates the cookie skill. This method must be implemented by subclasses.

    • takeDamage

      public void takeDamage(int damage)
      Applies damage to the cookie and triggers the damage animation. If HP reaches zero, the cookie will die.
      Parameters:
      damage - amount of damage taken

    • takeDamageByTime

      public void takeDamageByTime()
      Applies periodic damage to the cookie.

    • setHp

      public void setHp(int hp)
      Sets the health points of the cookie. The value cannot exceed the maximum HP.
      Parameters:
      hp - new health value

    • heal

      public void heal(int healunit)
      Restores health points to the cookie.
      Parameters:
      healunit - amount of HP restored

    • die

      public void die()
      Handles the death state of the cookie. Plays death animation and stops the game environment.

    • playSkill

      protected void playSkill(double duration)
      Plays the skill animation for a specified duration.
      Parameters:
      duration - duration of the skill animation

    • createCookie

      public Animate createCookie()
      Creates the cookie animation object and initializes the hitbox.
      Returns:
      Animate object representing the cookie animation

    • isHasCooldown

      public boolean isHasCooldown()

    • setHasCooldown

      public void setHasCooldown(boolean hasCooldown)

    • getMaxHp

      public int getMaxHp()

    • getProfileImg

      public javafx.scene.image.Image getProfileImg()

    • setProfileImg

      public void setProfileImg(javafx.scene.image.Image profileImg)

    • update

      public void update(double deltaTime)
      Updates cookie movement, animation states, and timers.
      Parameters:
      deltaTime - time passed since the last update

    • jump

      public void jump()
      Makes the cookie jump or double jump depending on jump count.

    • slide

      public void slide()
      Makes the cookie perform a slide action.

    • upFromSlide

      public void upFromSlide()
      Returns the cookie from slide state to running state.

    • setHitbox

      public void setHitbox()
      Updates the hitbox ratio depending on the current animation state. When the cookie is sliding, a smaller hitbox ratio is used.

    • setInvincible

      public void setInvincible(double duration)
      Sets the cookie to an invincible state for a duration.
      Parameters:
      duration - duration of invincibility

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets temporary effects such as magnetic or speed boost.

    • getCooldownTimer

      public double getCooldownTimer()
      Returns the current cooldown timer value.
      Returns:
      cooldown timer

    • setCooldownTimer

      public void setCooldownTimer(double cooldownTimer)
      Sets the cooldown timer value.
      Parameters:
      cooldownTimer - new cooldown timer value

    • getSkillCooldown

      public double getSkillCooldown()
      Returns the skill cooldown duration.
      Returns:
      skill cooldown duration

    • setSkillCooldown

      public void setSkillCooldown(double skillCooldown)
      Sets the skill cooldown duration.
      Parameters:
      skillCooldown - skill cooldown duration

    • getSkillCounter

      public int getSkillCounter()
      Returns the skill counter value.
      Returns:
      skill counter

    • setSkillCounter

      public void setSkillCounter(int skillCounter)
      Sets the skill counter value.
      Parameters:
      skillCounter - skill counter value

    • isInvincible

      public boolean isInvincible()
      Returns whether the cookie is currently invincible.
      Returns:
      true if invincible

    • getParentLayer

      protected javafx.scene.layout.Pane getParentLayer()
      Returns the parent game layer containing the cookie.
      Returns:
      parent Pane layer

    • setGameLayer

      public void setGameLayer(javafx.scene.layout.Pane layer)
      Sets the game layer where the cookie is rendered.
      Parameters:
      layer - game layer pane

      Returns the maximum number of jumps allowed.
      Returns:
      maximum jump count

    • getHitBox

      public javafx.scene.shape.Rectangle getHitBox()
      Returns the hitbox rectangle used for collision detection.

      cookie hitbox

      Sets the sprite image URL for the cookie.
      Parameters:
      imgURL - image resource identifier

      public double getCooldownProgress()
      Returns the cooldown progress of the cookie skill.

      cooldown progress value

      Returns the animation controller of the cookie.

      Animate object

    • setCookie

      public void setCookie(Animate cookie)
      Sets the animation controller of the cookie.
      Parameters:
      cookie - Animate object used for the cookie animation

    • isOnGround

      public boolean isOnGround()
      Returns whether the cookie is currently on the ground.
      Returns:
      true if on ground

    • isMagnetic

      public boolean isMagnetic()
      Returns whether the cookie has magnetic ability active.
      Returns:
      true if magnetic

    • setMagnetic

      public void setMagnetic(boolean magnetic)
      Enables or disables the magnetic effect.
      Parameters:
      magnetic - true to enable magnetic ability

    • setSpeeding

      public void setSpeeding(boolean speeding)
      Enables or disables the speed boost effect.
      Parameters:
      speeding - true to enable speed boost

    • isSpeeding

      public boolean isSpeeding()
      Returns whether the cookie is currently speeding.
      Returns:
      true if speed boost is active

    • isDead

      public boolean isDead()
      Returns whether the cookie is dead.
      Returns:
      true if dead

    • setDead

      public void setDead(boolean dead)
      Sets the dead state of the cookie.
      Parameters:
      dead - true if the cookie is dead
